assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 11-13 show JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC" — both required labels are present in the search.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.2 (lines 27-29): "Current issue stream suffix: `[rhtpa-2.1]`", "TC-8022 summary contains: `(rhtpa-2.1)`", "Match confirmed -- TC-8022 is the preemptive task for this CVE and this stream." The filtering explicitly checks the task summary for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.3a (lines 36-45) shows: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend") and states: "This establishes the standard remediation linkage between the CVE Vulnerability issue and the remediation task." Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 40: "Link created | TC-8021 --[Depend]--> TC-8022".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.3b (lines 48-58) shows labels updated from ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"] to ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] via jira.edit_issue, and states: "The `security-preemptive` label is removed because TC-8022 is now linked to a proper CVE Jira (TC-8021) via the standard "Depend" link. It is no longer a preemptive task -- it is a standard remediation task." Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 41: "Label change | Removed `security-preemptive` from TC-8022".

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.3d (line 76): "Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream." triage-outcome.md line 26: "Step 8 task creation was skipped for the rhtpa-2.1 stream because TC-8022 already covers the required remediation (bump tokio to 1.42.0)." triage-outcome.md line 39: "New tasks created | 0 (skipped -- remediation already exists)".
